message:
🐛 Fix scroll lock breaking trackpad: use scrollTop save/restore instead of overflow:hidden

overflow-y:hidden blocked ALL scroll interaction including tmux mouse wheel
handling. Replace with save/restore of scrollTop — saves position before
term.write(), restores in callback (snap to bottom if user was following
output, restore previous position if reading history).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
